title: Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary is in Nandyal district, Andhra Pradesh , India.
overview.description: Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary is in Nandyal district, Andhra Pradesh , India. It is primarily as a habitat of the great Indian bustard, the species has suffered a drastic fall in its numbers in the sanctuary in recent years.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (183 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rollapadu Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gadivemula, Miduthuru, Chintalapalle.
